commit_scope: Debugged the fkwu staged-input lane and proved the roadmap verb's reconciliation runs END-TO-END ON FKWU (the c-bootstrap kernel) over staged data, native awk, no read_file / no host awk / no bash in the compute loop -> 127 (matches host awk). fkwu carries no read_file (host file reads are a standing wall for the universal walker), so the sovereign pattern is the body's own (fkwu_run.sh / fsh-main): a thin host carrier stages bytes into input_byte (tag 17, the door fkwu DOES carry) and fkwu computes native. Hardened scripts/fkwu_run.sh against two footguns that made the lane silently return 0: (1) it cd's to form/, so form/-prefixed paths read empty -> now resolve_path accepts form/-relative, repo-root-relative, or absolute and FAILS LOUD on a missing file; (2) core.fk is BML (section [form.bml]) and corrupts the flattened table (the `melt` diagnostic) -> now dropped, since the fourth-shim mirrors its vocabulary (matching validate.sh's fourth-arm path).

commands: printf 'shell-awk fks 127\n' > rows; scripts/fkwu_run.sh rows <s-expr shell preludes> form-stdlib/tests/shell-awk-staged.fk   # -> 127 (first stdout line)
scripts/fkwu_run.sh fourth-arm-bands.txt form-stdlib/tests/does-not-exist.fk   # -> 'file not found' loud, non-zero
scripts/fkwu_run.sh rows form-stdlib/core.fk ... shell-awk-staged.fk   # -> 'dropping core.fk (the shim mirrors it)'
local_validation.fourth_arm: The awk COMPUTE is the four-way shell-awk band (127). The staged run is fkwu-only (input_byte tag 17 is not in Go/Rust/TS) — a sovereign-run demonstration, not a four-way claim.
local_validation.native_binary: fkwu universal-kernel binary runs the reconciliation over input_byte-staged rows -> 127, matching host awk.
local_validation.notes: Two honest edges named: read_file stays a per-kernel host-io carrier (and diverges: go=0/rust=0/ts=127 over a relative path), so the staging carrier does the read; and saw-read materializes the input by per-byte recursion (O(n^2), deep) — it segfaults on the full 38KB manifest, so the carrier stages the relevant rows and a streaming cursor reader is the named follow-on. The str_to_int('127\n')->0 newline gotcha was fixed in the recipe via sh-awk-trim.

ci_validation.notes: Observation; the awk compute's four-way gate runs in CI on the shell-awk band.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy; a lane fix + sovereign-run demonstration.

phase_gate.gate: Make the fkwu staged-input lane robust (no silent-0 footguns) and prove a real rented verb's logic runs sovereign on fkwu over staged data, respecting the host-io wall instead of fighting it.
phase_gate.next: Streaming input_byte cursor reader (no O(n^2) materialization) so whole-file inputs cross; then wire a carrier so `form-cli roadmap`/`fsh` stages rows and runs the reconciliation natively as the live path.
